candidateResults.title: Fortnite Long Wallet, Leather, Coin Purse, Men's, Women's, Large Capacity, Popular, Round Zipper, Bill Holder, Card Storage, Long Wallet, Present, Wallet
candidateResults.snippet:
About this item                     Long Wallet Size: Approx. 8.1 x 4.3 inches (20.5 x 11 cm), Thickness: 0.9 inch (2.3 cm), this long wallet has a large capacity that can hold bills, coins, and cards without hesitation. Weight about 170g     Luxurious synthetic leather: This thin long wallet is made of high quality synthetic leather, so it can be used clean and long lasting. Made of durable material that is scratch and stain resistant     COOL AND FUNCTIONAL: Simple and classy look that you need for a long time. We have focused on ease of use and functionality. The card slots are visible at a glance, making it easy to put out bills and coin purse. Keep it thin and stylish even when you put it all. Comfortable zipper pulls with custom zipper     4 Reasons to Choose a Long Wallet: 1. The design is easy to use and easy to remove cards and bills. 2. The free space design can store business cards, examination tickets, insurance cards, driver's licenses, etc. "Does not break, stain or bend. " Features: 3. The coin purse is designed to open wide, so it is easy to store and easy to take out. 4     Multi-functional and easy to organize long wallet: With card storage and spacious free space, you can keep your cards and cash organized and organized       
                     ›  See more product details
